description: This file defines a custom React hook useToast for managing in-app toast notifications. It includes internal state management for active toasts and functions to show and dismiss toasts, with support for auto-dismiss timing.

methods.name: useToast(defaultDuration = 3000)
methods.description: Custom hook that provides toast management functions, including displaying and dismissing toast notifications with optional auto-dismiss timer.

methods.name: showToast
methods.description: Adds a new toast notification with optional specific duration, automatically dismissing after the set time.

methods.name: dismissToast
methods.description: Removes a toast notification by its unique id.
